name: Joltix

known_values.effects: Experience the jolt of fireworks in every burst. This fun and entertaining 24-shot cake is loaded with red, white, purple, green, and blue dahlias with white, green, and gold strobing effects. It finishes with red spiders to entertain every age range in your crowd.
